title: anigozanthos bicolor subsp. exstans
intro: Anigozanthos bicolor subsp. exstans, commonly known as Kangaroo Paw, is a flowering plant native to Western Australia. It belongs to the Haemodoraceae family and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been used to treat various health issues such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Kangaroo Paw include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or ingested to leverage its health benefits.
